book.spectrum.guidebook.hexxspectrum.abo: It seems that media and colour are more interlinked than I first assumed...
book.spectrum.guidebook.hexxspectrum.anc: An anklet Invested with permanence. Creates an artificial wall between my mind and my pockets.
book.spectrum.guidebook.hexxspectrum.med: All gemstone shards and powder can now be used as media! A powder is worth one-fifth its corresponding shard.
The three base shards are all equal. An Onyx shard is worth a shard of quenched allay, and a Moonstone shard is worth a charged amethyst.
hexxspectrum.mishap.no_bangle: Tried to cast Sympathetic Extraction without a bangle!
book.spectrum.guidebook.hexxspectrinkets: A series of trinkets I have invented to accomplish various wizidrical tasks.
A trinket that appears to nature as a pickaxe. With a particular spell, one can route media through it, breaking a block with its enchantments. See the hex book for the pattern.
hexxspectrum.page.bangle: Route media through the worn Sympathetic Bangle, breaking a block with all enchantments on the bangle. Costs 1 dust per total enchantment level, or negligible if the bangle has Curse of the Void.
